scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:server: tsc --module CommonJS --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --rootDir . --outDir dist strapi-server.ts server/src/index.ts server/src/bootstrap.ts server/src/register.ts server/src/destroy.ts server/src/services/cypherscan.ts server/src/services/persistence.ts server/src/services/tracking.ts server/src/utils/get-local-upload-path.ts server/src/utils/normalize.ts server/src/utils/parse-response.ts
scripts.build:admin: tsc --module ESNext --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --rootDir . --outDir dist strapi-admin.ts admin/src/index.ts
